title: chorisochora chascanoides
intro: Chorisochora chascanoides, also known as the "Wormseed plant" or "Dittany of Crete," is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. Traditionally, Chorisochora chascanoides has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly to treat intestinal parasites and worm infestations, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activities. In herbal preparations, Chorisochora chascanoides is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
